<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a meshObjectCollection"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/meshobjectcollections"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint will create a new empty meshObjectCollection.

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API User authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Content-Type","in":"header","description":"meshObjectCollections are <<versioning,versioned>> and currently only support `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjectcollection.v1+json` as a `Content-Type`.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjectcollection.v1+json;charset=UTF-8"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshobjectcollection.v1+json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"required":["description","name","owner"],"type":"object","properties":{"owner":{"type":"string","description":"The owner of the meshObjectCollection"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Name of the meshObjectCollection (has to be unique)"},"description":{"type":"string","description":"A freetext field to help describing the contents of the meshObjectCollection"}},"title":"api-meshobjectcollections1637419709"},"examples":{"createMeshObjectCollection":{"value":"\n      {\n        \"name\": \"collection-name\",\n        \"owner\": \"collection-owner\",\n        \"description\": \"This is a meshObjectCollection.\"\n      }\n    "}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"201":{"description":"201"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
